author: y4rr
content: Plan: Add CLIP text encoder (12 layers, hidden=768, heads=12, max_pos=77, vocab=49408, QuickGELU, causal mask). Files: clip_text_encoder.rs (new), safetensors_loader.rs (extend with load_clip_text_encoder + DropReport), examples/clip_text_encode_dump.rs (new), pin_pretrained_diffusion_weights.py (extend for sd-v1-5-clip-text-encoder), verify_diffusion_inference.py (extend), conformance_pretrained_diffusion.rs (extend with 3rd parity test). Tokenization happens in pin script via CLIPTokenizer; rust just consumes pre-tokenized input_ids. After PASS: full SD-1.5 pipeline bit-perfect vs diffusers.
